instruction: Tampilkan nama kota pelanggan dan status pesanan mereka.
context: Table customers (customer_id, customer_city); Table orders (customer_id, order_status)
response: SELECT c.customer_city, o.order_status FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id;

instruction: Hitung total pendapatan (price) dari penjual yang berada di kota 'sao paulo'.
context: Table sellers (seller_id, seller_city); Table order_items (seller_id, price)
response: SELECT SUM(oi.price) FROM order_items oi JOIN sellers s ON oi.seller_id = s.seller_id WHERE s.seller_city = 'sao paulo';

instruction: Tampilkan kategori produk yang dibeli oleh pelanggan dengan ID 'c123'.
context: Table orders (order_id, customer_id); Table order_items (order_id, product_id); Table products (product_id, product_category_name)
response: SELECT DISTINCT p.product_category_name FROM products p JOIN order_items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.customer_id = 'c123';

instruction: Cari 5 pelanggan yang menghabiskan uang paling banyak untuk pesanan mereka.
context: Table customers (customer_id); Table orders (order_id, customer_id); Table order_payments (order_id, payment_value)
response: SELECT c.customer_id, SUM(op.payment_value) FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id JOIN order_payments op ON o.order_id = op.order_id GROUP BY c.customer_id ORDER BY SUM(op.payment_value) DESC LIMIT 5;

instruction: Tampilkan detail item pesanan termasuk nama kota penjualnya.
context: Table order_items (order_id, seller_id, price); Table sellers (seller_id, seller_city)

instruction: Hitung jumlah pesanan yang dikirim ke kota 'curitiba'.
context: Table customers (customer_id, customer_city); Table orders (order_id, customer_id)
response: SELECT COUNT(o.order_id) FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id WHERE c.customer_city = 'curitiba';

instruction: Tampilkan ID produk dan ID penjual untuk pesanan yang sampai lebih cepat dari estimasi.
context: Table orders (order_id, order_delivered_customer_date, order_estimated_delivery_date); Table order_items (order_id, product_id, seller_id)
response: SELECT oi.product_id, oi.seller_id FROM order_items oi JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.order_delivered_customer_date < o.order_estimated_delivery_date;

instruction: Tampilkan 3 kategori produk yang paling sering muncul dalam pesanan.
response: SELECT p.product_category_name, COUNT(*) FROM products p JOIN order_items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id GROUP BY p.product_category_name ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 3;

instruction: Tampilkan nama kota pelanggan yang pernah memesan produk dengan harga di atas rata-rata.
context: Table customers (customer_id, customer_city); Table orders (order_id, customer_id); Table order_items (order_id, price)
response: SELECT DISTINCT c.customer_city FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id WHERE oi.price > (SELECT AVG(price) FROM order_items);

instruction: Tampilkan kategori produk yang memiliki lebih dari 50 item terjual.
response: SELECT p.product_category_name, COUNT(*) AS total_sold FROM products p JOIN order_items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id GROUP BY p.product_category_name HAVING COUNT(*) > 50;

instruction: Klasifikasikan setiap pesanan berdasarkan total pembayarannya: 'Rendah' jika kurang dari 100, 'Sedang' jika antara 100 dan 500, dan 'Tinggi' jika lebih dari 500.
response: SELECT o.order_id, SUM(op.payment_value) AS total_payment, CASE WHEN SUM(op.payment_value) < 100 THEN 'Rendah' WHEN SUM(op.payment_value) BETWEEN 100 AND 500 THEN 'Sedang' ELSE 'Tinggi' END AS kategori_pembayaran FROM orders o JOIN order_payments op ON o.order_id = op.order_id GROUP BY o.order_id;

instruction: Tampilkan 5 lokasi teratas di negara bagian 'GO' urut berdasarkan latitude.
response: SELECT geolocation_zip_code_prefix, geolocation_lat FROM geolocation WHERE geolocation_state = 'GO' ORDER BY geolocation_lat DESC LIMIT 5;

instruction: Hitung jumlah total penjual di negara bagian 'PE'.
response: SELECT COUNT(seller_id) FROM sellers WHERE seller_state = 'PE';

instruction: Tampilkan daftar koordinat lokasi untuk penjual dari kota 'santos'.
context: Table sellers (seller_city, seller_zip_code_prefix); Table geolocation (geolocation_zip_code_prefix, geolocation_lat, geolocation_lng); Relationships: sellers.seller_zip_code_prefix = geolocation.geolocation_zip_code_prefix.
response: SELECT g.geolocation_lat, g.geolocation_lng FROM geolocation g JOIN sellers s ON g.geolocation_zip_code_prefix = s.seller_zip_code_prefix WHERE s.seller_city = 'santos';

instruction: Berapa rata-rata koordinat longitude untuk semua penjual di negara bagian 'RJ'?
context: Table sellers (seller_state, seller_zip_code_prefix); Table geolocation (geolocation_zip_code_prefix, geolocation_lng); Relationships: sellers.seller_zip_code_prefix = geolocation.geolocation_zip_code_prefix.
response: SELECT AVG(g.geolocation_lng) FROM geolocation g JOIN sellers s ON g.geolocation_zip_code_prefix = s.seller_zip_code_prefix WHERE s.seller_state = 'RJ';

instruction: Tampilkan 10 kota penjual dengan jumlah penjual terbanyak.
response: SELECT seller_city, COUNT(seller_id) AS total_sellers FROM sellers GROUP BY seller_city ORDER BY total_sellers DESC LIMIT 10;

instruction: Hitung jumlah total lokasi terdaftar di kota 'recife'.
response: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM geolocation WHERE geolocation_city = 'recife';
